response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to determine the scene structure. Identified distinct dialogue sections without background music and a long segment where a song plays while characters talk. 2. Identified the song 'ABOVE BELOW' by Hololive English -Justice- based on context cues. 3. Performed a search for 'ABOVE BELOW' lyrics. 4. Verified the song title, artist, and lyrics. 5. Mapped the scenes and populated the JSON data.
response.global_summary: This video features an introductory dialogue sequence followed by a narrative involving the VTuber group 'Hololive English -Justice-' as they track down a stolen 'national treasure'. The song 'ABOVE BELOW' by Hololive English -Justice- plays throughout the second half of the video as the background track during the characters' interactions.

scenes.description: Introductory sequence in a museum setting featuring Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame and Gigi Murin. No music playing.

The group 'Hololive English -Justice-' characters interact while the song 'ABOVE BELOW' plays in the background. Members: Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, Gigi Murin, Raora Panthera, and Cecilia Immergreen.
